title: Berserk Writer’s Classic Series Finally Coming to America
content: Since the passing of legendary creator Kentaro Miura, Berserk has been releasing new chapters thanks to writer Kouji Mori and the artists at Studio Gaga. While it’s been several months since we last saw Guts return with a new chapter, the dark series remains a fan-favorite.
author: ComicBook

title: Netflix’s One Piece Exec Shares Season 4 Hopes: “Wouldn’t It Be Amazing…?”
content: One Piece ‘s live-action series has been doing very well for itself with Netflix ever since it returned for Season 2, but the showrunner behind it all is hoping to see the series continue beyond its currently confirmed third season too.
author: ComicBook

title: Dan Da Dan Manga Takes 1-Month Break
content: The latest chapter of Yukinobu Tatsu 's DAN DA DAN manga on Shonen Jump+ announced on Tuesday that the series will take a break for a month and return on May 5. Viz Media and Shueisha 's MANGA Plus service both publish the manga in English digitally.
author: ANN

title: One of Anime’s Darkest Shows Confirms Release Date for New Movie Return
content: One of the most controversial and darkest TV anime releases is coming back for a new trilogy of feature films, and has set a release date for the first of these new outings. There are lots of dark fantasy anime that have left a deep impression on fans over the decades, but there are only a few that have managed to do…
author: ComicBook

title: 5th Live-Action Kingdom Film's New Trailer Revals 10 More Cast Members
content: The official website for the live-action films of Yasuhisa Hara 's Kingdom manga unveiled on Tuesday a special "Allied Forces" trailer and 10 more cast members for the fifth film , Kingdom : Tamashii no Kessen (Decisive Battle of the Soul).
author: ANN

title: KPop Demon Hunters Returns With New Animated Short
content: KPop Demon Hunters has had a major 2026 so far, thanks to taking home Oscar gold at this year’s Academy Awards. Winning the Oscars for “Best Animated Picture” and “Best Original Song,” animation enthusiasts are lying in wait for this universe to expand with its confirmed sequel.
author: ComicBook

title: Monthly Shonen Magazine Editorial Staff Suspends Manga's Serialization After Finding Artist Imitated Other Artworks
content: The editorial staff of Kodansha 's Monthly Shonen Magazine announced on Tuesday that it has ended the serialization of Matsurika's Oshiawase ni, Kekkonsha-sama. Watashi mo Watashi de, Shiawase ni Narimasu no de. ( Wishing you all the best, my fiancé. I'll be happy in my own way too.
author: ANN

title: After 8 Years, Cancelled Shonen Jump Revival Anime Confirms 2026 Release Date
content: One hidden gem of a Shonen Jump series is returning for a new anime revival eight years after it was cut short, and has confirmed its release date with a new update. It’s been an especially great time to be a nostalgic anime fan as a lot of major franchises have been making their returns with new anime projects.
author: ComicBook

title: R-Type Tactics I • II Cosmos Game's Trailer Reveals June 18 Release
content: NIS America announced on Tuesday that it will release Granzella's R-Type Tactics I • II Cosmos game in the West for Nintendo Switch 2, Nintendo Switch, PlayStation 4, PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC on June 18. The company streamed a trailer: There is a Limited Edition for Switch, PS4, and PS5.
author: ANN

title: 1.3 Million Gundam Fans Just Crowned the Top Ten Mechs
content: Over the decades, Mobile Suit Gundam has become the biggest anime franchise focusing on mechs, and you’d be hard-pressed to find anyone who says otherwise. While the likes of Neon Genesis Evangelion and Code Geass have made their marks on the anime world, Gundam has asserted its superiority with countless television…
author: ComicBook
